title: DriveWealth Instrument
description: A tradable financial instrument available through DriveWealth including US equities, ETFs, mutual funds, options, and fixed income securities.

id.description: DriveWealth unique identifier for this instrument (UUID format).

symbol.description: Primary ticker symbol for the instrument on its listing exchange.

name.description: Full name of the financial instrument or issuing company.

exchange.description: Primary listing exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ, NYSEARCA).

cusip.description: CUSIP identifier for US and Canadian securities.

sector.description: GICS sector classification for equity instruments.

industry.description: GICS industry group within the sector.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the instrument's trading currency.

fractionalEnabled.description: Whether fractional share trading is available for this instrument.

fractionalMinAmount.description: Minimum dollar amount for fractional share orders.

marginEnabled.description: Whether the instrument is eligible for margin trading.

orderTypes.description: Order types supported for this instrument.

status.description: Trading availability status for the instrument.

priceUpdatedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last price update.
